title: Diplospora sphaerocarpa
taxonomy: Diplospora sphaerocarpa is classified under the family Rubiaceae, which is a large and diverse family of flowering plants commonly known as the coffee or madder family. This classification places Diplospora sphaerocarpa within the order Gentianales. The genus Diplospora is native to Southeast Asia and is characterized by its unique flowers and growth habits. Within the Rubiaceae family, Diplospora sphaerocarpa is further distinguished by its specific morphological characteristics. The classification of Diplospora sphaerocarpa reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the Gentianales order.
